## Checklist

- [ ] `./vendor/bin/pint` passes
- [ ] `php artisan test` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or the extension API changed
- [ ] No debug statements, secrets, or dead code left behind
